intro: Five connected strands, one practice: turning technology into things people can use.

nodes.label: AI·AUTO
nodes.title: AI automation
nodes.body: Designing and building AI-assisted workflows and lightweight systems that do real work for small businesses.

nodes.label: DIGITAL
nodes.title: Digital practice
nodes.body: Standing up a digital function inside an organisation, from zero to a meaningful share of the business.

nodes.label: LEARN
nodes.title: Learning design
nodes.body: Instructional design and e-learning production: turning complex topics into things people can learn from.

nodes.label: WEB
nodes.title: Web & product
nodes.body: Front-end and product delivery across static sites, apps, and internal tools.

nodes.label: CREATIVE
nodes.title: Creative roots
nodes.body: Graphic design and visual communication since age 15. The origin story, still in the toolkit.
